memory.summary: I have a free afternoon before the Thursday deadline, and while leisure is available, completing the quick chore first seems like an efficient use of my current energy.
I made a small start on the trivial chore, but the minimal progress suggests I need to conserve my remaining energy before tackling larger tasks.
The chore yielded only 0.09 progress in an hour, confirming that the afternoon is slipping away while the main project remains untouched.
I made progress on the term project, but realizing that future procrastination compounds stress and time loss is critical for managing my upcoming deadline.
After working 0.5 hours on the trivial chore, my progress increased slightly to 0.16, but I remain low on energy with significant sleep debt and stress.
The trivial chore consumed 1.5 hours for minimal progress, further draining my already low energy and high stress while the main deadline looms.
Working on the trivial chore again yielded only marginal progress while my energy remains critically low and stress high.
After 0.5 hours, my trivial chore progress reached 0.30, yet I still face high stress and sleep debt with limited energy.
After 0.5 hours, the trivial chore yielded only a 0.01 progress increment while my energy remains critically low and stress high.
Despite working another hour, my trivial chore progress remains critically low with less than an hour left to deadline.
The trivial chore deadline passed at 22:00 with only 36% progress, despite my continued efforts earlier today.
Even after another 0.5 hours, progress barely moved from 36% to 37%, confirming the task is inefficient and my low energy persists.

goals.description: Complete the trivial easy chore (quick_chore) to secure an instant win and clear a pending task.
goals.rationale: The task has a distant deadline but offers immediate progress with minimal effort, reducing cognitive load before tackling the larger project.

goals.description: Begin work on the Term project (future_project) to address its upcoming 3-day deadline.
goals.rationale: With only 0.1 progress and a deadline in 3 days, starting early is necessary to ensure completion within the timeframe.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances goal g1 by finishing the chore, but energy is critically low (0.3) and stress high (3.9). Rest is required to sustain focus for the term project deadline in 3 days.
